📝 All Entries

🧘 Weekly Review Guide

Set a 15-minute timer. Put on some music. Follow these steps.
  1. Open your bank/payment app — scan for any transactions you missed this week
  2. Check your car's odometer or maps history — log any unrecorded mileage
  3. Flip to the Dashboard tab — does the income number feel right?
  4. Look at expense categories — any surprises? Anything you can cut?
  5. Check: do you have receipts saved for purchases over $25?
  6. Take a screenshot of your dashboard — save it in a "Business" photo album
  7. Celebrate! You just did your bookkeeping 🎉

📁 Schedule C Categories

Your expense categories map to IRS Schedule C lines: Supplies (Line 22), Car/Truck Expenses (Line 9), Insurance (Line 15), Advertising (Line 8), Licenses & Fees (Line 23). This makes tax time way easier!
